revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:50:59 on [[Template:Kyoto-geo-stub]]
revision.text: <div class="boilerplate metadata" id="stub"><table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="background-color: transparent;"><tr ><td >[[Image:Kyoto Prefecture shadow picture.png|45px|Kyoto prefecture]]</td ><td >'' This [[Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto]] location article is a [[Wikipedia:Perfect stub article|stub]]. You can [[Wikipedia:Find or fix a stub|help]] Wikipedia by [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit}} expanding it]''.</td ></tr ></table ></div >[[Category:Kyoto geography stubs]]

revision.comment: Macron
revision.text: <div class="boilerplate metadata" id="stub"><table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="background-color: transparent;"><tr ><td >[[Image:Kyoto Prefecture shadow picture.png|45px|Kyoto prefecture]]</td ><td >'' This [[Kyoto Prefecture|Kyōto]] location article is a [[Wikipedia:Perfect stub article|stub]]. You can [[Wikipedia:Find or fix a stub|help]] Wikipedia by [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit}} expanding it]''.</td ></tr ></table ></div >[[Category:Kyoto geography stubs]]

revision.comment: Spelled ''Kyoto'' in English (i.e. no macron) as specified in Wikipedia:Manual of Style (Japan-related articles)
revision.text: <div class="boilerplate metadata" id="stub"><table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" style="background-color: transparent;"><tr ><td >[[Image:Kyoto Prefecture shadow picture.png|45px|Kyoto prefecture]]</td ><td >'' This [[Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto]] location article is a [[Wikipedia:Perfect stub article|stub]]. You can [[Wikipedia:Find or fix a stub|help]] Wikipedia by [{{SERVER}}{{localurl:{{NAMESPACE}}:{{PAGENAME}}|action=edit}} expanding it]''.</td ></tr ></table ></div >[[Category:Kyoto geography stubs]]
